Class Department

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.PObject
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.company.Department
All Implemented Interfaces:
PAuthorizedObject, Serializable
@Entity public class Department extends PObject implements PAuthorizedObject
JPA entity to represent a Department of a Company. A Department has a key role in the Prioritize authorization mechanism. All objects which implement PAuthorizedObject must provide a Department. Usually this is the department the object belongs to (e.G. User X works for Department Y). If the Department is null for any PAuthorizedObject this is handled as a special case.
Author:
peter
